title: Remote relay beacon
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Relay_beacon.jpg|thumb|Dellis Tantor plants a remote relay beacon.]]
'''Remote relay beacons''' were tall communication structures which could retransmit data through a line-of-sight network. Once deployed, the beacons would search out any nearby beacons and establish a laser connection thourgh which data could be transmitted.<ref name="FC">''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''</ref>

Due to their line-of-sight limitations and relatively short range, they were most likely out-of-date and used only as a backup system, as they were when [[Dellis Tantor]] deployed a string of remote relay beacons to link the [[Ruul computer complex|central computer complex]] and [[Ruul uplink tower|uplink tower]] on [[Ruul (planet)|Ruul]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].<ref name="FC" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''
